backstory.original: Avren is an embodiment of mischief; a trickster god in humanoid form. Long ago, he tricked an ancient being into giving him magic and immortality. This power also came with a curse: whenever Avren dies, he will return to life with a new body and varying abilities. While Avren's body may change, however, his soul and his undying love for his wife, Sofieus, always remains. The two have remained married for centuries, seeking each other out to reunite in each lifetime.
backstory.display: 阿夫伦是恶作剧的化身，一位人形的诡计之神。很久以前，他欺骗了一个古老的存在，使他获得了魔法和不朽的力量。这种力量也伴随着诅咒：每当阿夫伦死亡，他就会以新的身体和不同的技能复活。虽然阿夫伦的身体会变，但是他的灵魂和对妻子索菲厄斯不朽的爱却始终不变。几个世纪以来，两人一直保持着婚姻关系，在每一世中都会寻找对方以重聚。

description.original: Avren tosses three spectral shards at random enemies. One does damage, one stuns, and one is fake and only briefly staggers the enemy.
description.display: 阿夫伦向随机敌人投掷三枚幽灵碎片。一枚造成伤害，一枚造成眩晕，还有一枚是假的，只会在短时间内使敌人动摇。

description.original: Avren casts Reduce on all his enemies and Enlarge on himself, then begins kicking the teenie-tiny enemies around.
description.display: 阿夫伦对所有敌人施放缩小术并对自己释放变巨术，然后开始乱踢被缩小的敌人。

longDescription.original: Avren casts Reduce on all enemies on the screen, dealing some damage and reducing their size by half and their damage done by 50% for 15 seconds. He also casts Enlarge on himself for the duration, and during that time his base attack changes from Spectral Shards to Kick.
longDescription.display: 阿夫伦对屏幕上的所有敌人施放缩小术，造成少量伤害并使他们的体型减半，造成的伤害降低 50%，持续 15 秒。他还会在持续期间内对自己施放变巨术，同时他的基本攻击会从幽灵碎片变为脚踢。

description.original: Avren summons a mirror image of himself next to others which provides various buffs based on the affected Champion's roles.
description.display: 阿夫伦在其他人身边召唤一个自己的镜像，根据受影响勇士的角色提供不同增益。

description.original: Avren increases global damage based on the number of Mirror Image buffs that are being provided.
description.display: 根据提供的镜像增益的数量，阿夫伦的整体伤害获得提升。

conditions.desc: $source casts Mirror Image every $cooldown seconds. The image lasts for $duration seconds and buffs its target depending on their tags.
$source casts Mirror Image every $cooldown seconds. The image lasts for $duration seconds and buffs its target depending on their tags.^^$(mirror_image_desc)
$source每 $cooldown 秒施放镜像。镜像持续 $duration 秒，并根据其目标的标记对目标进行相应强化。
$source每 $cooldown 秒施放镜像。镜像持续 $duration 秒，并根据其目标的标记对目标进行相应强化。^^$(mirror_image_desc)

tipText.original: Avren summons Mirror Images on random Champions, buffing them based on their roles.
tipText.display: 阿夫伦召唤随机勇士的镜像，并根据他们的职责进行强化。

description.desc: $source prefers casting Mirror Image on Good targets whenever possible.
$source会尽可能地对善良阵营的勇士施放镜像

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 阵型中的目标勇士数量：$sample_amount

specializationDescription.original: Avren focuses his Mirror Images on "good" champions, because evil never wins!
specializationDescription.display: 阿夫伦将他的镜像聚焦在“善良”勇士身上，因为邪恶必败！

description.desc: $source prefers casting Mirror Image on Neutral targets whenever possible (on the good/evil axis only).
$source会尽可能地对中立阵营的勇士施放镜像（以善良/中立/邪恶划分阵营时）

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 阵型中的目标勇士数量：$sample_amount

specializationDescription.original: Avren focuses his Mirror Images on "neutral" champions (note: only looks at neutral on the good/evil axis, NOT the lawful/chaotic axis).
specializationDescription.display: 阿夫伦将他的镜像聚焦在“善良”勇士身上（注：仅与善良/邪恶的中立相关，而非守序/混乱的中立）。

description.desc: $source prefers casting Mirror Image on Evil targets whenever possible.
$source会尽可能地对邪恶阵营的勇士施放镜像

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 阵型中的目标勇士数量：$sample_amount

specializationDescription.original: Avren focuses his Mirror Images on "evil" champions, because good is dumb!
specializationDescription.display: 阿夫伦将他的镜像聚焦在“邪恶”勇士身上，因为善良太蠢！

description.desc: Increases the duration of Mirror Image by $amount% to 60 seconds.
镜像效果的持续时间提高 $amount% 至 60 秒

specializationDescription.original: Avren focuses on making his Mirror Images last longer, increasing the number of potentially affected Champions.
specializationDescription.display: 阿夫伦专注于延长镜像的持续时间，并增加潜在的受影响勇士数量。

description.desc: Increases the effects of Mirror Image by $amount%.

specializationDescription.original: Avren focuses on making his Mirror Images more powerful, increasing their individual effects.
specializationDescription.display: 阿夫伦专注于强化他的镜像，提高其各自的效果。

description.desc: Increases the Damage of all Champions by $(not_buffed amount)% (multiplicative) for each Champion adjacent to $source_hero. The base amount is increased by $bonus% for each active Mirror Image effect on the adjacent Champion.
每有一位与$source_hero相邻的勇士，即提升所有勇士伤害 $(not_buffed amount)%（乘算）。每有一位相邻的勇士拥有镜像，此加成即提升 $bonus%

tipText.original: Avren buffs the party based on how many buffs his Mirror Images are providing.
tipText.display: 阿夫伦根据镜像提供的增益数量来强化队伍。

description.original: There'll always be another Avren, but there'll never be another *you!*
description.display: 始终会有另外的阿夫伦，但绝不会再有另一个“你”！

description.original: Ages of exploring the multiverse has given me a gift for leadership
description.display: 多年来对多位面的探索，给予了我领导天赋。

description.original: Oh, now you all want to follow me?
description.display: 哦，现在你们都想跟随我了？

description.original: A mirrored image is only as good as its source, they say...
description.display: 他们说，镜像最多只能跟本体一样强......

description.original: Blinding to others perhaps, but not one as grand as myself.
description.display: 对其他人来说也许令人盲目，但对我这样的大人物来说并非如此。

description.original: We're facing a god with 5 pairs of eyes. Watch each other's backs.
description.display: 我们面对的是一个有五双眼睛的神。它们相互照看着身后。

description.original: To get stronger, may I suggest channeling obscene amounts of power?
description.display: 为了变得更强，我可以建议你灌注巨量的能量吗？

description.original: Well, it's not the worst form I've had, so I'll take it.
description.display: 嗯，不算我碰到过的最糟糕形态，所以我欣然接受。

effects.description: Avren also counts as a Gnome

description.original: I've got friends in weird places.
description.display: 我在一些奇怪的地方也有朋友。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by 20% for each unique species in the formation, stacking additively.

character_sheet_details.backstory: Avren is an embodiment of mischief; a trickster god in humanoid form. Long ago, he tricked an ancient being into giving him magic and immortality. This power also came with a curse: whenever Avren dies, he will return to life with a new body and varying abilities. While Avren's body may change, however, his soul and his undying love for his wife, Sofieus, always remains. The two have remained married for centuries, seeking each other out to reunite in each lifetime.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Avren summons mirror images of himself, which buff affected Champions base on their role(s), and then he provides a massive global buff increased in-part by the number of buffs his mirror images are providing.

event_upgrades.name: Mirror Image
event_upgrades.description: Avren summons a mirror image of himself next to others which provides various buffs based on the affected Champion's roles.

event_upgrades.name: Seeing Double
event_upgrades.description: Avren increases global damage based on the number of Mirror Image buffs that are being provided.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 阿夫伦是恶作剧的化身，一位人形的诡计之神。很久以前，他欺骗了一个古老的存在，使他获得了魔法和不朽的力量。这种力量也伴随着诅咒：每当阿夫伦死亡，他就会以新的身体和不同的技能复活。虽然阿夫伦的身体会变，但是他的灵魂和对妻子索菲厄斯不朽的爱却始终不变。几个世纪以来，两人一直保持着婚姻关系，在每一世中都会寻找对方以重聚。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 阿夫伦召唤自己的镜像，根据受影响勇士的角色为其提供增益，随后他会提供一个大型全局增益，数值根据他的镜像提供增益的数量而提升。

event_upgrades.name: 镜像
event_upgrades.description: 阿夫伦在其他人身边召唤一个自己的镜像，根据受影响勇士的角色提供不同增益。

event_upgrades.name: 眼花缭乱
event_upgrades.description: 根据提供的镜像增益的数量，阿夫伦的整体伤害获得提升。
